Macros, data structures, and functions for utilities, circular buffers, caches, CRC-32, hashing, memory, lists, math, sorting, strings, trigonometry, UUIDs, and build scripts.

## Folders
- **[includes](includes/README.md)**: Macros, data structures, and functions for various utilities like assertions, memory, and logging.

## Files
- **[build_id.c](build_id.c.md)**: Checks if an ELF note contains a GNU build ID.
- **[circular_buffer.c](circular_buffer.c.md)**: Implements a circular buffer with functions for initialization, reading, writing, and data management.
- **[circular_cache.c](circular_cache.c.md)**: Implements a circular cache with functions for initialization, item management, and cache operations.
- **[crc32.c](crc32.c.md)**: Implements a nybble-wide table-driven CRC-32 algorithm for efficient checksum calculation.
- **[hash.c](hash.c.md)**: Implements a DJB2 hash function for computing a 32-bit hash from a byte array.
- **[heap.c](heap.c.md)**: Heap memory management implementation with functions for allocation, deallocation, and heap integrity checks.
- **[hexdump.c](hexdump.c.md)**: Implements a function to format and print data in hexadecimal and ASCII representation.
- **[iterator.c](iterator.c.md)**: Implements an iterator with initialization and navigation functions for next and previous elements.
- **[keyed_circular_cache.c](keyed_circular_cache.c.md)**: Implements a keyed circular cache with functions to initialize, retrieve, and push items.
- **[list.c](list.c.md)**: Functions for managing doubly linked lists, including insertion, removal, traversal, and searching.
- **[math.c](math.c.md)**: Mathematical utility functions for operations like sign extension, serial distance, and GCD calculation.
- **[math_fixed.c](math_fixed.c.md)**: Implements a recursive filter function for fixed-point arithmetic operations.
- **[order.c](order.c.md)**: Comparator function for comparing two uint32_t values.
- **[platform.c](platform.c.md)**: Default implementations for system-specific functions in libutil, with weak linkage for easy overriding.
- **[sort.c](sort.c.md)**: Implements a bubble sort algorithm for arrays with a custom comparator function.
- **[string.c](string.c.md)**: String manipulation utilities including whitespace stripping, integer to string conversion, and case conversion.
- **[trig.c](trig.c.md)**: Trigonometric functions using lookup tables for sine, cosine, and arctangent calculations.
- **[uuid.c](uuid.c.md)**: Functions for generating, comparing, and converting UUIDs to strings.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling the libutil library with different target environments.
